posts.caption: Amazing weekend in Goa with @rahul_kapoor and @priya_singh! Beach sunset was magical 🌅 #GoaVibes
Priya's birthday is coming up on 25th March! Planning a surprise @rahul_kapoor you in?
Just joined EcoFuelZ as Product Intern! Excited about sustainable energy #EcoFuelZ

messages.text: Guys, Goa this weekend? Long weekend vibes!
100%! Priya is in too, she confirmed.
Yes! Booking hotel near Calangute Beach.
Perfect. Let's take the 6AM Rajdhani on Friday.
Guys Priya birthday is 25th March. We need a gift.
Thinking a silver necklace from Tanishq. She has been eyeing one.
Great! I can put 3000. Shivansh you?
I can contribute 2000 for the necklace.
